description: Integrated launch-day smoke for the canonical D16/D16, threshold-reservation, K=10 urgency-signalling configuration under the simulator's max-of-two fee-cap semantics. Runs seeds 0-9 for 2,000 slots without event traces. Results are paired against the archived corrected max-of-two/no-floor D16 calibration and its pre-correction counterpart; this is a diagnostic integration check, not an equivalence test.
